metadata.description: SEO + GEO toolkit for growth engineers — site inventory, on-page audit, query-fanout page & blog spawning, semantic internal linking, sitemap/robots, llms.txt, and AI-text humanization.

plugins.name: overgrow
plugins.description: SEO + GEO toolkit for growth engineers. 9 skills (init, audit, grow, spawn-pages, spawn-blogs, spawn-internal-links, sitemap, llmstxt, humanize) to inventory pages, audit on-page signals, build the Bonemeal action queue (/grow), spawn landing pages and blogs via query-fanout, wire semantic internal links, build sitemap/robots, generate llms.txt, and humanize AI-sounding copy.
